# openmetadata Provider

Terraform provider for managing OpenMetadata resources (teams, glossaries, classifications, etc.).

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "openmetadata" {
  # Set via environment variables:
  #   OPENMETADATA_HOST  = "https://openmetadata.example.com"
  #   OPENMETADATA_TOKEN = "eyJhbG..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String) OpenMetadata server URL (e.g., https://openmetadata.example.com). Can also be set via OPENMETADATA_HOST environment variable.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) JWT authentication token for the OpenMetadata API. Can also be set via OPENMETADATA_TOKEN environment variable.
